items.title: 'Make Tech Value Again': This is software's 'only hope'
items.description: Portfolio Wealth Advisors president and chief investment officer Lee Munson chats with Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre on the New York Stock Exchange floor to discuss the market's (^DJI, ^GSPC, ^IXIC) reaction to the Iran war, volatility (^VIX), and more. Watch the video above to learn about how tech stocks (XLK) could become value stocks, to hear what Munson wants to see from the software (IGV) sector, and what might be next for gold (GC=F). To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.

items.title: DA Davidson Lowers PT on Salesforce, Inc. (CRM) Stock
items.description: Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) is one of the Best Automation Stocks to Buy According to Analysts. On February 27, DA Davidson analyst Gil Luria reduced the firm’s price objective on the company’s stock to $200 from $235, while keeping a “Neutral” rating after the Q4 2026 results, as reported by The Fly. As per the firm, […]

items.title: Adobe Q1 Earnings Loom: Hold or Fold the Stock Ahead of Results?
items.description: ADBE heads into Q1'26 results, with revenues expected at $6.28B and EPS at $5.88, as AI-powered Acrobat, Express and Firefly adoption aim to offset GenAI competition.

items.title: Salesforce Expands Agentforce With Formula 1 Partnership And Finance Shift
items.description: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) expanded its Agentforce AI platform with new partnerships, including a project to power a Fan Companion Agent for Formula 1. The company is extending Agentforce into sectors such as sports and telecom to support large scale, real time digital engagement. Salesforce also updated its leadership structure, with Robin Washington taking on the role of Principal Accounting Officer. For investors watching the AI tools race, NYSE:CRM is pushing Agentforce beyond its core...

items.title: Microsoft and Anthropic team up to bring Claude Cowork to Microsoft 365
items.description: Microsoft is bringing Anthropic's Claude Cowork to its Microsoft 365 suite.
